messages.content: Hello! How can I help you today? If you have a task or project in mind, feel free to let me know, and I'll assign it to the appropriate team member.
Write a short blog post about the benefits of green tea

[TASK_ASSIGN]
agent: quill
title: Write blog post on green tea benefits
description: Create a short, informative blog post about the health benefits of green tea. Include sections on its antioxidants, potential weight loss effects, heart health benefits, and tips for brewing. Aim for 500-800 words, with engaging and informative content.
priority: Medium
[/TASK_ASSIGN]

I'm assigning this task to Quill, our Content Writer. He'll craft a compelling blog post that highlights the various health benefits of green tea.
Create a landing page. Scout analyze the codebase first, then Builder creates it, then Pixel styles it.

[TASK_ASSIGN]
agent: scout
title: Codebase analysis for landing page
description: Conduct a thorough analysis of the current codebase to identify existing components and frameworks that can be utilized or need improvements for building a new landing page. Provide a detailed report with recommendations.
priority: High
[/TASK_ASSIGN]

I've assigned the task to Scout to start by analyzing the codebase to understand what resources we have and what needs to be done for the landing page. 

Once Scout completes the analysis, I'll assign Builder to construct the landing page, and Pixel to handle the styling and user interface design. I'll keep you updated as work progresses.
